name: Fortifi Bank
description_short: Fortifi Bank is a Wisconsin-based community bank offering checking accounts, savings, mortgages, and business lending with a focus on relationship-driven service and local reinvestment.
description_long: Fortifi Bank, formerly 1st National, has operated as a community bank since 1876, making it over 150 years old. The institution emphasizes deep roots in Wisconsin communities and positions itself as a relationship-focused alternative to larger national banks. The bank operates nine branches across Wisconsin, including locations in Berlin, Green Bay, Green Lake, Montello, Omro, Oshkosh, Ripon, Waunakee, and Winneconne. The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal and business banking services. Their flagship product is Checking+, which features either 5% cash back on debit purchases or 4.07% APY on deposits, with no minimum balance or monthly fees. Additional offerings include personal loans, mortgages (purchase and refinance), business banking solutions, and optional round-up savings features. They provide 1:1 banker relationships and claim to offer expert guidance across personal finance, homeownership, and business growth. Fortifi differentiates itself through explicit community reinvestment messaging, stating that deposits turn into loans for local individuals and small businesses rather than being deployed nationally or internationally. The bank highlights volunteer community involvement and financing of local businesses and facilities. Customer testimonials emphasize personalized relationship quality, with named employees (Emily, John) receiving praise for consulting and partnership approaches rather than transactional banking. While the bank offers competitive rates on checking (4.07% APY requires qualification through monthly debit card purchases, direct deposit, and eStatement enrollment), the 4.07% APY only applies to balances up to $15,000; higher balances earn 0.15% APY. The geographic footprint is limited to Wisconsin, making this unsuitable for those requiring national branch access. Limited information is publicly available about mortgage rates, business loan terms, or other product pricing, requiring direct contact with a banker for specifics.
services: Checking+ accounts with 5% cash back or 4.07% APY rewards
Personal savings accounts and deposit products
Personal loans for consolidation and life purchases
Business banking and small business lending
Merchant cash advance and equipment financing (mentioned via business banking)
1:1 banker consultation and financial planning guidance
Community banking and local reinvestment programs
pros: Checking+ offers 5% cash back on up to $200 in monthly debit purchases with no minimum balance or monthly fees
150-year operating history since 1876 provides institutional stability and established community roots
1:1 banker relationships with named staff members noted for personalized consulting and partnership approach
Explicit community reinvestment model keeps deposits local as loans to known individuals and small businesses
ATM refunds up to $10 per month reduce out-of-network banking costs
Optional round-up savings feature helps customers automatically build wealth
Multilingual support available in English, Spanish, and Hmong
cons: High APY (4.07%) on Checking+ only applies to balances up to $15,000; balances above that earn only 0.15% APY, creating a cliff effect
Qualifying for Checking+ rewards requires 18 monthly debit card transactions, direct deposit, and eStatement enrollment—not automatic for all account holders
Limited geographic footprint to nine Wisconsin locations only; no online-only or national branch access for customers outside Wisconsin
Minimal publicly available information about mortgage rates, business loan terms, or other product pricing; requires direct banker contact for quotes
Website content does not disclose FDIC insurance limits or details about deposit protection beyond Member FDIC statement
best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking community-focused banking with personalized banker relationships and local reinvestment
Small business owners in Wisconsin looking for consulting-oriented lenders who understand their market
First-time homebuyers in Wisconsin who want expert mortgage guidance and local lender continuity
Individuals who prioritize keeping their deposits local and supporting community economic development
diagnosis: Fortifi Bank is best for Wisconsin residents who value relationship-driven, community-focused banking and want their deposits to support local businesses and neighbors. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Wisconsin—customers outside this footprint cannot access branches—and the need to qualify for checking rewards through specific monthly transaction requirements, making the advertised rates not automatic for all account holders.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Fortifi Bank is a Wisconsin community bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, and business lending with relationship-driven service.
